action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 13 completed training the 768-dim 8-layer MPNN with JK connections, virtual node, and BCE loss for 30 epochs. Validation AP reached 0.2472, a significant improvement over iteration 10's best val AP of 0.2303. Training took ~46 minutes. No eval has been submitted for this checkpoint yet. Analysis: The architectural upgrades (JK, wider network) combined with the reverted BCE loss are working well. I need the test-set avg_precision to confirm improvement over the current best test AP of 0.2087. With ~2.15 hours and 17 iterations remaining, I have time for further tuning after this eval. Decision: Submit eval for checkpoints/best.pt immediately without modifying any files, since the pipeline is intact.
